calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Oct-16-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Judgment Debtor JOSE J. CISNEROS, Tel No. 650-219-4426 appearing in pro per;
No appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Judgment Debtor did not notify the Court or Judgment Creditor of his intent to appear at hearing to argue against the Court's tentative ruling. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. As to PLAINTIFF STATE FARM BANK'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption, Judgment Debtor Jose J. Cisneros' Claim of exemption is denied. Judgment creditors to recover $175 per pay period or $350 per month from judgment debtors earnings. COURT TO PREPARE AND SEND OUT A FORMAL ORDER TO PARTIES AND SHERIFF'S OFFICE. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
